systems.name: Vexas
systems.description: A mined-out husk, a century past its prime.

orbitals.name: Bolorus
orbitals.description: A once-vibrant gas giant, now strip mined down to a ball of exhaust.

landing_options.name: Abandoned Mining Platform
landing_options.description: Solar-powered maintenance drones keep it minimally operational, but it could sink into the clouds any day now.

destinations.name: Rig Manager's Office
destinations.description: Strangely clean, given how long it's been abandoned. There's no life here to generate dust, you guess. There is however some truly sophisticated art over the desk.

details.name: Sophisticated decor
details.description: It's an old-fashioned paper pinup of a scantily-clad Antarran "Actress." Under a blue lipstick print is a signature and the inscription: "From one hometown spawn to another -- stay inscrutable, <3 Andira Manara."

orbitals.name: Rainbow
orbitals.description: The ugliest moon in the galaxy, it's name is a bit of a joke -- partly a reference to its iridium mines, partly a reference to its once beautiful view of the gas giant below.

landing_options.name: Mining Colony 5
landing_options.description: Home sweet home. Sometimes you wonder what happened to colonies one through four. If life here is any indication, they must have died of boredom.

destinations.name: Pointless Store
destinations.description: There's nothing here anyone could want.
